data.title: JPMorgan, Wells Fargo, Morgan Stanley, BNY Mellon Will 'Strike A Cautious Tone': Analysts
data.description: Major U.S. banks report Q1 2025 results April 11, with analysts watching loan growth, trading revenue, and policy risks.

data.title: 'Someone Asked Why '$75K Is Seen As A Low Salary On Reddit.' The Responses Actually Make More Sense Than You'd Expect
Sportradar's Bets Big On Sports Data, Analyst Says Company Has Favorable Setup
data.description: JP Morgan raises Sportradar's price target to $27, boosting 2026 revenue and EBITDA forecasts, driven by live betting and data innovation.

data.title: Why Is Pharma Giant Roche Stock Trading Lower On Wednesday?
data.description: Roche's MUSETTE trial found no additional benefit of high-dose Ocrevus over the 600 mg IV dose, reaffirming its efficacy and safety for relapsing multiple sclerosis.

data.title: BioMarin Seeks Label Expansion For Palynziq After Positive Phase 3 Results In Adolescent Patients
data.description: BioMarin's Phase 3 trial shows Palynziq significantly reduces blood Phe in adolescents with PKU. The company plans a regulatory submission for label expansion.
